unit.name: WP_Http request method-derived redirect option decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request branch decision that a zero parsed redirection count disables Requests follow_redirects while nonzero counts keep the redirects option path. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, redirection defaults and filters, HEAD redirection override, hook registration, header/cookie/SSL/max_bytes/data_format handoff, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Temporary copied public PHP shell retired for this bounded branch; full WP_Http::request ownership still requires request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates.
